body.title: [escalated] memory_emit.MEMORY_ROOT frozen at import — UU_MEMORY_ROOT redirect ignored after import
body.description:
Make devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py honor UU_MEMORY_ROOT set at ANY time, not only at import. Bug: MEMORY_ROOT is a module constant captured at import (memory_emit.py:38) and used at line ~154 (out_dir), so a later env change is ignored while every other reader (unseen_university.memory_root, proof_store, ticket_store) resolves the root LIVE — silently splitting the store.

**Fix:** resolve the root at CALL time — replace the frozen MEMORY_ROOT usage at line ~154 with a live lookup (a helper reading os.environ['UU_MEMORY_ROOT'] each call, mirroring unseen_university.memory_root.memory_root()); keep the same default fallback. Do NOT edit tests.

**Affected files:** devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py

**Test plan:** make tests/test_memory_emit_frozen_root.py pass (it is RED today: sets UU_MEMORY_ROOT after import and asserts emit() writes to the new root). red->green on tests/test_memory_emit_frozen_root.py

**Completion criteria:** tests/test_memory_emit_frozen_root.py green; existing behavior (default root when env unset) unchanged.

**intention:** I intend that memory_emit honors UU_MEMORY_ROOT set at any time.
